name: stisla-monorepo
description: Stisla v3 dev tree. Publishable packages live under packages/* — see @stisla/css and @stisla/vanilla.
author: Nauval Azhar <nauvalazhar2@gmail.com> (https://stisla.dev)

scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run build:site
scripts.pack:packages: npm run build:packages && cd packages/css && npm pack && cd ../vanilla && npm pack
